_comment: SPEC v5 §2 — Ashveil Isle. x/y are PIXELS in the artwork (1672x941), measured by a pixel scan of the DRAWN grid lines. The grid is deliberately NOT uniform (AI artwork), hence real line positions instead of a formula.
_deploy_rule: Deployment ALWAYS goes to the sector the squad currently stands in (Game.sector). 'demo' only means: part of the demo content — NOT: directly selectable. You move on by foot across the sector edge (SPEC v5 §2: start F4, only exit west -> F3). island.gd accepts 'demo' and 'playable' as equivalent.

sectors.name: Landing Zone
sectors.note: Insertion point. The helicopter sets you down here.

sectors.name: Rookhaven
sectors.note: Fishing village under Helix guard. Tobias Rook is held in the warehouse cellar.
sectors.reach: No direct insertion — leave the landing zone to the west on foot.

sectors.name: Rookhaven — Docks
sectors.note: The far end of the village. Sealed off for the demo.

sectors.name: Mined Ridge
sectors.note: The ridge north is mined. Helix exclusion zone.

sectors.name: Briar Hollow
sectors.note: Second village, loyalty questline. Not in the demo.
